checks.name: Login works
checks.note: Login form renders, credentials accepted, session created. Minor issue: post-login redirect goes to 404 instead of dashboard. User can navigate to dashboard manually and is authenticated.

checks.name: Dashboard loads without errors
checks.note: Dashboard loads with real metrics: Total Nodes 2, Clusters 3, Anomalies 4. Clean layout.

checks.name: Cluster health chart renders
checks.note: Anomalies summary widget visible with Critical/Warning/Info breakdown. Cluster cards show health status.

checks.name: Resource usage chart renders
checks.note: CPU metric shown in top bar. 36 SVG/chart elements found. Real K8s data displayed.

checks.name: Alerts page functional
checks.note: Alert Rules page loads with 128 rules. Table with all columns. Create Alert button present.

checks.name: Clusters list page works
checks.note: 3 clusters displayed with real data. Table with provider, health, access, version, nodes, endpoint. Filters working.

checks.name: Theme toggle works
checks.note: Dark/Light toggle works. Both themes render correctly.

checks.name: Navigation smooth
checks.note: Navigated through Dashboard, Clusters, Alerts smoothly.

issues.description: Post-login redirect goes to 404 instead of dashboard

code_bugs.description: Post-login redirect broken - shows 404 instead of redirecting to dashboard
